arabic:
وَأَخْرَجَهُ: مِنْ حَدِيثِ اِبْنِ عَبَّاسٍ بِلَفْظٍ: نَهَى.‏ وَزَادَ: { 
" وَكُلُّ ذِي مِخْلَبٍ مِنْ اَلطَّيْرِ" }   (1727)‏ .‏‏6 ‏- صحيح.‏ رواه مسلم ( 1934 )‏.‏

english.text: Muslim transmitted the same hadith on the authority of Ibn 'Abbas (RAA), 'He (The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ)) prohibited...' and had the additional phrase, 'and every bird with talons.'
